approvalSource: Steve prioritized the build-lane verifier result parser repair after the May 18 Planck confusion and local build-lane telemetry false positives.
scopeSummary: Repair build-lane failure telemetry parsing so successful verifier PASS lines with detail text like 0 failed are not recorded as failures while real FAIL, ERROR, and Command failed lines still record.
constraints: Do not launch parallel builders during this card.
Do not rewrite historical local telemetry logs.
Do not weaken, skip, bypass, or demote real verifier, ship, fanout, or backlog hygiene failures.
